message:
feat(web): improve accounts page and run-installer UX

Accounts page (bead 9dl9):
- Add prominent subscription cost warnings for AI agents
- Add skip-for-now reassurance note
- Verified default-collapse for recommended/optional tiers

Run-installer page (bead r1z5):
- Add installation output interpretation guide
- Explains green checkmarks, yellow warnings, red X meanings

Closes beads: 9dl9, sixt, 3vvj, nic8, r1z5, 6stg, l82e, w6gf

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -329,6 +329,20 @@ export default function AccountsPage() {

+ {/* Cost warning - prominent placement for subscription services */} + + Some AI coding agents require expensive subscriptions to use after installation: +
    +
  • Claude Code: Requires Claude Max ($200/mo)
    • +
  • Codex CLI: Requires ChatGPT Pro ($200/mo)
    • +
  • Gemini CLI: Requires Gemini Ultra (~$275/mo)
    • +
+

+ You don't need all of them! Start with one agent (Claude Code is recommended) + and add others later if you want different AI perspectives. +

+ + {/* Google SSO tip - uses getGoogleSsoServices() to show count */} {getGoogleSsoServices().length} of {SERVICES.length} services support Google SSO. @@ -435,6 +449,16 @@ export default function AccountsPage() { + {/* Skip reassurance note */} +
+

+ Don't want to create accounts now?{" "} + That's completely fine! You can skip this step and create accounts after + installation. The ACFS installer will still install all the tools—you'll + just need to authenticate them later when you're ready to use them. +

+
+ {/* Action buttons */}

@@ -258,6 +258,22 @@ export default function RunInstallerPage() { + {/* Installation output guide */} + +
+

You'll see lots of text scrolling by. Here's what to look for:

+
    +
  • ✔ Green checkmarks = Step completed successfully
    • +
  • ⚠ Yellow warnings = Non-critical issue, installer continues
    • +
  • ✖ Red X = Something failed, but installer will retry or skip
    • +
+

+ Just wait for the final "Installation complete" message. If you see errors, + you can always re-run the installer—it will retry failed steps. +

+
+ + {/* Success signs */}

✔ Agent Flywheel installation complete!
